dashboard.title: Welcome, {{name}}
dashboard.description: Apply for new micro-credentials, track your applications and share your achievements.

about.title: About you
about.description: A short bio shown on your public profile, next to your shared credentials.
about.label: About
about.placeholder: Tell visitors a bit about yourself — your background, interests, what you're learning…

language.title: Language preference
language.description: Your selected language is remembered on your profile and applied on every device.

credentials.title: My credentials
credentials.description: Review and accept new credentials, then manage your wallet.
credentials.searchPlaceholder: Search by credential name or skill
credentials.pendingBanner: Review each credential below. Once you accept it, the credential becomes valid and is anchored on the blockchain. If something is wrong, you can reject it and provide a reason for the issuer.

rejectedCard.title: Rejected
rejectedCard.waiting: Waiting for the issuer to update the credential and resend, or to accept the rejection.

rejectDialog.title: Reject credential
rejectDialog.description: Let the issuer know why you are rejecting {{title}}. They can edit the issuance details and resend, or accept the rejection.
rejectDialog.placeholder: e.g. The grade is incorrect — should be 9/10.

toasts.acceptedPending: Blockchain confirmation is pending — it will appear once anchored.

rejectedBanner.title: You rejected this credential.
rejectedBanner.waiting: Waiting for the issuer to update and resend, or to accept the rejection.

acceptance.title: Please review and accept this credential
acceptance.description: This credential is not yet valid and is not anchored on the blockchain. Once you accept it, it becomes valid in your wallet and is anchored automatically. If something is wrong, reject it with a reason for the issuer.

rejectDialog.title: Reject credential
rejectDialog.description: Explain to the issuer why you are rejecting this credential. They can update the issuance details and resend, or accept your rejection.
rejectDialog.placeholder: e.g. The grade is incorrect — should be 9/10.

shareCard.title: Share & verification
shareCard.copyDenied: Copy not allowed in this preview — select the link manually.

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.demoNotice: Demo credential — toggles change only your local view.
visibility.liveNotice: Changes apply immediately to the public verification page.
visibility.footer: Learning outcomes and quality assurance documents are always visible on the shared verification page.

applications.title: My applications
applications.description: Track every credential application you've submitted.
applications.lifecycleEmpty: Select an application to view its timeline.

apply.title: Apply for a micro-credential
apply.description: Pick a credential template and submit your application. The issuer handles all verification internally.

empty.notLinked: You are not linked to any institution yet. Contact the platform admin to be linked to an institution.
empty.noTemplates: No active micro-credentials available from your institution(s) yet.
empty.noMatches: No micro-credentials match the current filters.

review.title: Review & apply
review.info: After you apply, the issuer will internally verify your participation and progress this application through the lifecycle. You can track the status from your Applications page.

toasts.blocked: You already have an active application or credential for this template.

profile.title: Public profile
profile.description: A single shareable page that aggregates all credentials you've made public. Share it on LinkedIn, by link, or via QR.
profile.howIt1: Toggle individual credentials as public from each credential's detail page.
profile.howIt2: Your public profile shows only credentials you've explicitly enabled.
profile.howIt3: Share via direct link, LinkedIn post, or downloadable QR code.
profile.emptyPublic: You haven't made any credentials public yet. Open a credential and toggle "Publicly verifiable".

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Updates about your credentials, applications and institutions.
